channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-03 09:47 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: A paralyzed man is playing chess and Mario Kart solely by thinking, thanks to Neuralink. 🧠
item.description: A paralyzed man is playing chess and Mario Kart solely by thinking, thanks to Neuralink. 🧠

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine makes the cutest videos.
item.description: Grok Imagine makes the cutest videos.

item.title: @elonmusk: Next flight of Starship and first flight of V3 ship & booster is 4 to 6 weeks away
item.description: Next flight of Starship and first flight of V3 ship & booster is 4 to 6 weeks away

item.title: @elonmusk: Sometimes I wonder if a coding agent is just another type of drug. It keeps telling you that you are...
item.description: Sometimes I wonder if a coding agent is just another type of drug. It keeps telling you that you are doing great and gives you an empowering productivity boost. When taken away, you feel useless with a rush of anxiety. That sounds like a drug.

item.title: @elonmusk: Amazing cinematic angles and beautiful image and video quality with the new Grok Imagine update.
item.description: Amazing cinematic angles and beautiful image and video quality with the new Grok Imagine update.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok imagine fast on the left, Quality on the Right
item.description: Grok imagine fast on the left, Quality on the Right

item.title: @elonmusk: $TSLA🇰🇷 BREAKING : Tesla Korea delivered 11,130 vehicles to customers during the month of March. The...
item.description: $TSLA🇰🇷 BREAKING : Tesla Korea delivered 11,130 vehicles to customers during the month of March. The figure is quite a surprise. Tesla has recorded its highest monthly sales since entering the Korean market in 2017. That's an incredible number, and I can see how much Koreans care about Tesla. Look at the incredible charts!

item.title: @elonmusk: I used to love going to the Westfield mall with my grandchildren. And now, in New York City, the Rit...
item.description: I used to love going to the Westfield mall with my grandchildren. And now, in New York City, the Rite Aid near me used to have a security guard and all shelves locked up. It’s now empty and for rent. So sad 😞

item.title: @elonmusk: They may be onto something with this space based data center thing
item.description: They may be onto something with this space based data center thing
